title: Bridge Essay: The cognitive reality monitoring network and theories of consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** (Phase 10) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Imaginal to mechanistic neuroscience through The, cognitive, reality, monitoring, network.

**The cognitive reality monitoring network and theories of consciousness.** — Neurosci Res. PMID: 38316366. DOI: 10.1016/j.neures.2024.01.007. Theories of consciousness abound. However, it is difficult to arbitrate reliably among competing theories because they target different levels of neural and cognitive processing or anatomical loci, and only some were developed with computational models in mind. In particular, theories of consciousness need to fully address the three levels of understanding of the brain proposed by David Marr: computational theory, algorithms and hardware.
